industry.title: Image Classification for Aqua Robotics Maintenance
industry.description: Built end-to-end classification system for Aqua Robotics' maintenance robots that clean fishing plant nets. Detects both growth and hole classes in underwater imagery. Deployed on AWS using Terraform for infrastructure; employs AWS Lambda and Apache Spark for scalable data processing.

industry.title: ML for Offshore Fish Farm Automation
industry.description: Designed ML algorithms to optimize maintenance for offshore fish farms. Implemented computer vision models to monitor fish health, detect anomalies, and ensure optimal conditions. Integrated AI-driven insights into robotic systems for cleaning and inspecting underwater facilities.
